info.description: REST API gateway for EXBanka microservices.
info.title: EXBanka API Gateway

get.description: Returns all bank accounts. Requires employee authentication.

post.description: Creates a new bank account for a client. Requires employee authentication.

get.description: Returns all accounts for the currently authenticated client, sorted by available balance descending.
Returns detailed info for a single account. The account must belong to the authenticated user.

put.description: Sets the daily and monthly spending limits for an account. Requires employee authentication.
Changes the name of the account. The account must belong to the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns full account details for any account. Requires employee authentication.

get.summary: Get all cards for the authenticated client
Get details of a specific card by database ID

post.summary: Request a new card — sends email confirmation code to client
Confirm card request with email code — creates the card

get.summary: Get details of a specific card

put.summary: Block a card (client — own card only)

get.description: Returns all payments made from the authenticated client's accounts, with optional filters.

post.description: Initiates a payment from client's account to a recipient account.

get.description: Returns details of a single payment owned by the authenticated client.
Returns all saved payment recipients for the authenticated client.

post.description: Saves a new payment recipient for the authenticated client.

put.description: Updates a saved payment recipient. Only the owning client can update.

delete.description: Deletes a saved payment recipient. Only the owning client can delete.

get.description: Returns all internal transfers for the authenticated client's accounts.

post.description: Transfers funds between two accounts belonging to the authenticated client. Applies currency conversion when accounts have different currencies.
Activate a new employee account using an activation token and set a password.
Send a password reset email to the given address.
Set a new password using a password reset token.
Activate a new client account using an activation token and set a password.
Authenticate a client with email and password, receive JWT tokens.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated client.

post.description: Exchange a valid client refresh token for a new access token.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of clients. Requires employee authentication.

post.description: Creates a new client and sends an activation email. Requires employee authentication.

get.description: Returns a single client by ID. Requires employee authentication.

put.description: Updates an existing client. Requires employee authentication.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all employees.

post.description: Create a new inactive employee and send an activation email.

get.description: Search employees by email, first name, last name, or position with pagination.
Retrieve a single employee by their numeric ID.

put.description: Update all fields of an existing employee.

get.summary: Get exchange rate between two currencies
Get all loans for authenticated client
Get details + installments for a loan

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, receive JWT tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
